steps.title: Compare formation dates
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize order. The notes say Vaalbara formed about 3.6 billion years ago, while Euramerica formed about 300 million years ago, so Euramerica formed much later.

steps.title: Reject nonordering choices
steps.content: A defines both as supercontinents without showing order, C describes the supercontinent cycle generally, and D mentions only Vaalbara. The needed sentence directly states the temporal relationship between the two formations. The answer is B.
